narrative:
Harrison Township E (precinct in Licking County) has 1,920 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
